description: Style Note Created for today's generation, this spinn Dozer shoe embodies the brand's motto - combining technology and high-octane fashion. We think these are just right, both for Sports and for braving the urban jungle, thanks to their nonchalantly sturdy aesthetic. An all-weather staple, the style perfectly suits the cosmopolitan vibe you love!Product DetailsRound toed casual shoe in black and green with an upraised heel and lace-up fasteningSynthetic leather upper with perforations, overlays at the heel Well padded collar and tongue (with branding)EVA midsoleArch support system made of TPU with two-piece rubber outsole at the forefoot and heel with suction points at the big toe area and at the ball of the footMaterial and CareSyntheticDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
